product.description: FairPrice Yakitori consists of grilled pieces of tender chicken leg, skewered and marinated with Japanese-style soy sauce. The sweet and savoury glaze, with the charcoal charred fragrance gives it a rich flavour that will keep you wanting more. It is a source of protein, naturally trans fat free and free of artificial preservatives. Enjoy it on its own or accompany it with steamed rice and edamame for a well-rounded meal.

metaData.Ingredients: Chicken Leg, Water, Sugar, Soy Sauce (Water, Defatted Soybeans, Wheat, Salt), High Fructose Corn Syrup, Modified Starches (E1422, E1440), Flavour Enhancers (E621, E631, E627), Colouring (E150A), Humectant [Ins451(I), Ins452(I), Ins450(Iii), Ins340(Ii), Maltodextrin], Salt, Acidity Regulator (E330), Rice Vinegar and Stabiliser (E415).
metaData.Key Information:
• Glazed with Fragrant Soy Sauce
• Juicy & Tender Meat
• Charcoal Grilled
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking instructions:
Do not defrost. Once thawed, do not refreeze.

Microwave:
Without defrosting, place 4 - 5 pieces of Yakitori on a microwavable plate and heat for 2.5 - 3.5 minutes at 800 watts.

Conditions may vary due to different brands of cooking equipment used.
metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE CHICKEN YAKITORI WITH SOY SAUCE 250G
metaData.Storage Information:
Keep frozen (-18°C & below).
Once thawed, do not refreeze.

product.description: Salmon is an excellent source of vitamin B12, vitamin D and selenium. It is a good source of niacin, omega-3 fatty acids, protein, phosphorus and vitamin B6. The salmon flesh texture are combination of flaky and smooth. It has a mild sweet flavour with strong briny taste. Salmon also taste great even just by baking in oven with olive oil without other seasoning.

metaData.Key Information:

• Each packet consists of 4 pieces

product.description: French scallops are wild-caught from the Normandy and Brittany coasts of France and flash frozen at sea to retain their original flavour and plump texture. These scallops are tender with a sweet buttery flavour, and ideal for high-heat cooking such as soups and broths, searing, baking, broiling, frying and grilling.

metaData.Ingredients: Scallops (Pecten Maximus), Water and Humectants [Ins450(I), Ins451(Ii)].
metaData.Key Information: Plump in texture and buttery flavour
metaData.Preparation:
Scallops must be thawed and fully cooked before consumption. Scallops should be firm and opaque when cooked.

[Pan Sear Icon] Pan Sear:
1. Pat dry the scallops with kitchen paper and season them if necessary.
2. Preheat a pan over medium heat and add olive oil or butter.
3. Add the scallops and cook for 6 minutes (3 minutes on each side) or until golden browned.


[Pot Icon] Soup: Place the scallops in boiling soup and simmer till cooked.
metaData.Storage Information:
Keep frozen (-18°C & below).
Once thawed, do not refreeze.

metaData.Key Information: Watties baby peas, young, tender baby peas from the fertile canterbury plains where the combination of location, soil and climate creates the perfect conditions for our peas to grow.
metaData.Preparation:
• Microwave:
1. Place 250g of frozen peas in a microwave-proof dish
2. Do not add water
3. Cover and cook on high for 2 minutes
3. Stir and cook for a further 2 minutes
4. Drain and serve
• Stove Top:
1. Add frozen peas to rapidly boiling water
2. Bring to boil again and simmer for approximately 2 minutes
3. Drain and serve
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep frozen
• Store at -18°C or colder

metaData.Ingredients:
• Chicken Satay: Chicken, Sugar, Salt, Turmeric, Garlic, Shallots, Ginger, Lemongrass, Galangal, Coriander, Cumin, Fennel
• Satay Sauce: Peanuts, Water, Vegetable Oil, Sugar, Salt, Chilli, Coconut Milk, Tamarind, Fennel, Cumin, Coriander, Galangal, Garlic, Shallots, Lemongrass, Ginger
metaData.Key Information:
• Traditionally Marinated

• No MSG

• Gravy provided and vacuum packed
metaData.Preparation:
• Cooking Instruction for Pan Fry Satay:
1. Thaw satay meat slices thoroughly
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan
3. Place thawed meat slices in pan and stir fry for 6 minutes
4. Serve with hot satay sauce and slices of cucumber and onions
5. Can also be served with noodles or rice
• Heating Instruction for Satay Sauce:
Empty satay sauce into pot and heat for 3 minutes at low heat
• If using Microwave:
Empty satay sauce into a microwave safe bowl and heat for 2 minutes

product.description: This product may vary from Vietnam / China depending on stock availability

metaData.Key Information:
• Ready to cook shrimp meat

• Firm and springy texture, without the use of seasoning

• Rich shrimp sweetness taste

• Can be cooked in a variety of dishes
metaData.Preparation:
1. In a large bowl, stir together olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, garlic, and black pepper
2. Season with crushed red pepper
3. Add shrimp, and toss to coat
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes
5. Preheat grill for high heat
6. Lightly oil grill grate
7. Grill for 2 to 3 minutes per side, or until opaque
